title: rubus brachyadenes
intro: Rubus brachyadenes, also known as the Alpine Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rubus brachyadenes include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Rubus brachyadenes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried into capsules and powder for various medicinal uses.
